inputs.label: Hash Rate
inputs.businessContext: The total hash rate of the mining hardware.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total hash rate of the mining hardware.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de hachage total du matériel minier.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de hash total del hardware de minería.

inputs.label: Power Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total power consumption of the mining rig.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total power consumption of the mining rig.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation électrique totale de la plateforme minière.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo total de energía del equipo de minería.
Costo de la electricidad por kilovatio-hora.

inputs.label: Pool Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fee percentage charged by the mining pool.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fee percentage charged by the mining pool.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Madencilik havuzu tarafından alınan ücret yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der vom Mining-Pool erhobenen Gebühr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de frais facturé par le pool minier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de comisión cobrado por el pool de minería.

inputs.label: Daily Revenue per TH/s
inputs.businessContext: Estimated daily revenue in USD per TH/s of hash rate, based on current network conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated daily revenue in USD per TH/s of hash rate, based on current network conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut ağ koşullarına göre TH/s hash oranı başına USD cinsinden tahmini günlük gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter täglicher Umsatz in USD pro TH/s Hashrate, basierend auf aktuellen Netzwerkbedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu quotidien estimé en USD par TH/s de taux de hachage, basé sur les conditions actuelles du réseau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso diario estimado en USD por TH/s de tasa de hash, basado en las condiciones actuales de la red.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
